ModMetaData.name: Vanilla Races Expanded - Android: Overhaul Patch
ModMetaData.author: och1ai
ModMetaData.description:
An overlay patch for Vanilla Races Expanded - Android that reworks androids into repairable, mechanoid-like machines: repair instead of permanent damage, a blood/core/subroutine rework, a body designer, a gestator-style assembler, and deeper anomaly / psychic / ideoligion integration.
This is an add-on. It requires the original Vanilla Races Expanded - Android and does not replace or redistribute it - it loads afterward and overrides its behaviour.
